heading: Opsgenie
body:
To create or update an Opsgenie integration using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas integrations create OPS_GENIE [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas integrations create OPS\_GENIE](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-integrations-create-OPS_GENIE).
